creator: stlexus@gmail.com
text:
>To submitter: Another bug has recently been fixed in the BTX loader,
 >are you able to test again with a recent version of FreeBSD (the
 >7.2-BETA1 or 7.2-RC1 ISO images, or anything later will contain the >fix).
Currently bug is still here - on 9.0 release BTX halted if Promise 
Fasttrack 2650 controller (with established raid array) is installed.
